summary: Validate resourceType via parameterized sqlite_master lookup before interpolating into SELECT in Store.ListIDs.
reason: Greptile flagged the raw fmt.Sprintf table interpolation as a SQL injection sink (P1) — same finding the press already addressed for outlook-calendar via cli-printing-press#1000. Generated code still ships the pre-fix template here, so this patch closes it for this CLI until the template lands in the version of the press that prints this slug.
